CLASSIC DESIGN: This Silver Heart Wax/Oil Burner is the ideal addition to your house setup. Its classy design will add a sense of elegance and luxury while gently releasing the aroma throughout the room.
UNIQUE GIFT: This Wax/Oil Burner is an excellent gift for your loved ones. It is such a unique device that will never go out of style.
PREMIUM QUALITY: This wax/oil burner is composed of high-quality materials that will last for years, making it well worth the price.
VERSATILE: This burner can be used to heat scented oils, melt waxes, and more. It is easy to clean and store.
